    T

    takeSnapshot() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Provides a snapshot of the data.
    TcpRobotService - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    An implementation of RobotService that uses TCP/IP for communication with a discovered robot.
    TcpRobotService(DiscoveredRobot) - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TcpRobotService
    Constructs a new TcpRobotService.
    TelemetryListener - Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.service
    A listener that runs in a separate thread to receive telemetry data from the robot over UDP.
    TelemetryListener(int, SensorCache) - Constructor for class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TelemetryListener
    Constructs a new TelemetryListener.
    toString() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.CommandResult
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.DiscoveredRobot
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorCache
    Returns a string representation of the sensor cache's current state.
    toString() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorSnapshot
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    turnCameraLightOff() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns off the camera light.
    turnCameraLightOn() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns on the camera light.
    turnLedOff(int) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns off a specific LED.
    turnLedOn(int, int, int, int) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns on a specific LED with a given color.
    turnLeft(double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns the robot left by a specified number of degrees.
    turnRight(double) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Turns the robot right by a specified number of degrees.
